# name: # Canonical dependency manifest for ATELIER. TAB-separated. Probe passes when it exits 0.
# ATELIER reviews with built-in vision (Read sees PNGs — no API key) and drives live browsers via the
# Playwright MCP (.mcp.json). Companions (pressroom, foundry, ideator) are PLUGINS, referenced by
# capability, not probed here. User-flow rendering is pressroom's job (verify via /pressroom:check).

install-hint: install via Volta (PREREQUISITES/00-core.md) — runs the crawler + npx
npm i -g @playwright/mcp (launched via npx — live crawl/screenshot/a11y snapshot)
GitHub CLI (cli.github.com) — used by self-improve to open the improvement PR

probe-command: npx --no-install playwright install --dry-run chromium 2>/dev/null || command -v chromium || command -v chromium-browser
install-hint: npx playwright install --with-deps chromium (the MCP downloads its own on first use)
apt install ripgrep (faster local search over design notes/markers)
